repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: These five memories involve op_host compilation errors for torch#1 ops (ca6k_00045, ca6k_00188, ca6k_00227, ca6k_00246, ca6k_00262) that are similar to the current ca6k_00289 failure. While the exact ListInt syntax error is not documented, these memories illustrate common pitfalls in manually written op_host code (duplicate registrations, incorrect tiling API usage) and may help the repair by reinforcing careful review of generated attribute code and avoidance of non-standard constructs.
